caption: A man wearing a tan and white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hooded sweatshirt featuring the text "BOSS TALK" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. In the background, a white banner displays the word "HUSTLE" repeated vertically alongside gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug with "BOSS TALK" written in red and white text sits on a dark table. A small logo that says "BOSS TALK" is also visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a similar posture, gazing slightly to his left with a focused expression. There is very little movement between the frames, with only minor shifts in his facial expression and head position.
